title: S-400 system, Dhanush guns: Centre clears Rs 2.8 lakh crore deal in major defence boost
content: India's Defence Acquisition Council has greenlit defense deals worth approximately Rs 2.38 lakh crore to bolster military capabilities.  Key acquisitions include advanced air defense systems for the Army, medium transport aircraft and the S-400 missile system for the Air Force, and heavy-duty air cushion vehicles for the Coast Guard, significantly enhancing national security.

title: Middle East crisis: Govt puts export duties on diesel, turbine oil; eyes Rs 1,500 cr collection
content: The government has imposed export duties on diesel and turbine fuel to boost domestic availability and energy security, estimating Rs 1,500 crore in revenue. Simultaneously, special excise duties on petrol and diesel were reduced to shield consumers, keeping retail prices stable amid global oil supply concerns.

title: Why did stock market crash today? Nifty50 ends below 22,850; Sensex down almost 1,700 points
content: Stock market crash today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex dropped in trade on Friday as US-Iran war tensions and crude oil prices continued to weight on sentiment. While Nifty50 went below 22,850, BSE Sensex was down almost 1,700 points.

title: ‘Virat Kohli has it easier than Rohit Sharma’: Ex-India batter's explosive take
content: As IPL 2026 begins, cricket giants Dhoni, Kohli, and Rohit Sharma are under the spotlight. Commentator Aakash Chopra believes Kohli's fitness and opening role give him an edge. He notes Dhoni faces a tougher challenge due to his age and limited recent play. Rohit is expected to maintain his aggressive batting approach for Mumbai Indians.

title: Mark Zuckerberg wants to make Meta an 'AI-native' co, what it means for its engineers
content: Meta is aggressively transforming into an AI-native company, embedding artificial intelligence deeply into its engineering and operational processes. Ambitious targets are set for AI-assisted code development across key divisions by 2026. This strategic shift aims to enhance productivity and product quality amidst fierce competition, with employee performance now linked to AI tool adoption.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' BO day 9: Ranveer Singh starrer inches closer to netting Rs. 700 crore
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage epic, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', shows no signs of slowing down as it enters its high-stakes second weekend. Starring Ranveer Singh as the covert spy Hamza, the film has officially joined the elite Rs. 1,000 crore global club in just nine days, matching the record-shattering pace of Allu Arjun starrer 'Pushpa 2.' The sequel is now poised to surpass the Rs. 894.49 crore lifetime record set by the original 2025 released 'Dhurandhar.'

title: ‘Hats off to him’: Yograj’s rare praise for Dhoni, slams retirement calls
content: Former cricketer Yograj Singh has surprisingly backed MS Dhoni to continue playing in the IPL, urging him to play for another decade. Singh praised Dhoni's fitness, discipline, and dedication, dismissing age as a factor for retirement. He questioned critics and highlighted that performance should be the sole criterion for selection, even referencing younger stars.

title: Top executives of two biggest US companies are leaving and they say the reason is AI
content: Two prominent CEOs, from Coca-Cola and Walmart, have cited the rise of AI as a factor in their decisions to step down. Both leaders indicated that the evolving business landscape, driven by AI, necessitates new leadership for future growth phases. Their departures highlight a significant technological shift impacting executive decision-making at major corporations.

title: How recent foreign tax credit changes impact salaried taxpayers earning from abroad
content: FTC allows individual taxpayers to claim a credit in India for taxes paid in a foreign jurisdiction on the same income, thereby reducing the tax payable in India.

title: Candace Owens accuses Erika Kirk of plotting Charlie Kirk murder
content: Candace Owens has accused Erika of plotting her husband’s murder, alleging she tried to shape public perception in advance. Owens pointed to an Instagram post from September 8, where Erika shared a video of her frail mother, claiming it was meant to gain sympathy and build a narrative. The claims remain unverified and have sparked intense online debate.

title: Melinda French Gates shares the rule she has when she is upset
content: Melinda French Gates revealed her 48-hour rule for delivering feedback on work, allowing time to process before communicating to ensure honesty and grace. This practice, which she calls 'gracious, thoughtful,' aims to foster employee growth and prevent surprises during performance reviews. Gates also shared a surprising piece of advice from an IBM hiring manager that led her to join Microsoft.

title: Married man in live-in relationship with adult woman not a crime: Allahabad HC
content: The Allahabad high court ruled that a married man in a consensual live-in relationship with an adult woman is not a criminal offense.  The court emphasised separating morality from law, stating such unions are not criminal unless specific laws are broken. These observations were made during a hearing concerning a couple challenging a police case filed by the woman's mother.

title: School headmistress dances to TVK chief Vijay's movie song, suspended
content: A headmistress from Thanjavur district faced suspension after a video of her dancing to a Vijay movie song at a Women's Day event went viral. The action was taken due to alleged violation of government conduct rules. The dance occurred at an event organized by Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam.

title: Magic Johnson opens up on living with HIV years after diagnosis
content: Magic Johnson recently revisited his journey living with HIV during a conference in Atlanta, offering a candid reflection shaped by decades of experience. From his shocking 1991 retirement to becoming a global advocate, Johnson turned fear into purpose. Supported by his wife Cookie and guided by medical progress, he continues to inspire through honesty, education, and resilience, proving his impact extends far beyond basketball.

title: NFL Trade rumor: Chargers linked to $90 m Dolphins star to boost Justin Herbert offense
content: Tyreek Hill trade talk picked up again as the Los Angeles Chargers are reportedly targeting Miami Dolphins playmaker Tyreek Hill, a $90M talent, to address their offensive struggles. A viral post suggested that Hill could join the Chargers or Chiefs after the NFL Draft. Money also plays a role. Hill may not command the full value after the injury. That makes this a smart gamble for Los Angeles. If the Chargers pull this off after the draft, it solves their biggest issue. It adds speed, forces defences to back off, and finally gives Herbert the weapon he has been missing.

title: MLB Rumors: Detroit Tigers' $140 m call as Kevin McGonigle rises
content: Detroit's decision to place Kevin McGonigle on the Opening Day roster has created a roster crunch, pushing Javier Báez into an uncertain role.  With his substantial contract, trade talks are intensifying. A potential deal with Miami could see Báez move for prospects, offering Detroit payroll relief and a clearer path for younger talent.

title: ‘Hungry to prove a point’: Pathan backs Prithvi Shaw as Delhi Capitals opener
content: Former India all-rounder Irfan Pathan advocates for a bold Delhi Capitals opening pair, backing Prithvi Shaw to join KL Rahul. Pathan lauded Rahul as a consistent run-scorer and believes Shaw, returning after a strong domestic season, has a point to prove. He cautioned Shaw against self-imposed pressure, urging focus for a successful comeback.

title: Petrol, diesel price today: After excise duty cuts, will fuel rates in your city come down?
content: The government has announced a reduction in excise duty on petrol and diesel. While excise duty on petrol has been cut, the levy on diesel has been removed altogether with an aim to cushion consumers from the surge in global crude oil prices.

title: Fan denied entry to stadium for ‘Free Imran Khan’ T-shirt, forced to cover up
content: A cricket fan was initially denied entry to the Sheffield Shield final for wearing a "Free Imran Khan" T-shirt, but Cricket Australia later reversed the decision. Authorities clarified that support for the jailed former Pakistan captain is considered a humanitarian issue, not a political one, allowing fans with similar messages entry.

title: Rajnath to head inter-ministerial group to monitor Middle East conflict-linked issues
content: Rajnath Singh will lead a new inter-ministerial group addressing the Middle East conflict's impact. Union ministers Amit Shah, Nirmala Sitharaman, and Hardeep Singh Puri are members. The group will focus on energy security, supply chains, and global order disruptions. Prime Minister Narendra Modi announced seven empowered groups to assess and mitigate economic effects.

title: From Fattah-2 to Qassem Basir: Why Iran’s most advanced missiles are missing from battlefield
content: Iran's most advanced missiles, including the Qassem Basir and Fattah-2, remain unused despite ongoing conflict. Experts suggest these sophisticated weapons might be held in reserve, destroyed, or not yet fully operational. While older missiles have been deployed, recent attacks show a decline in numbers and high interception rates by US and Israeli forces.

title: India prepares to re-start LNG buys from Russia; seeks US waiver, says report
content: Apart from crude oil disruptions, the supply of LPG and LNG have also been hit. India imports a big portion of its LPG and LNG needs and has been looking to step up procurement from alternative sources.

title: 'Dupatta gali se color karwaya hai': Kamran Akmal roasts PSL over jersey color fiasco
content: The Pakistan Super League's 2026 season kicked off with a bizarre incident where the white match ball turned pink due to color transfer from the Hyderabad Kingsmen's jerseys. Former cricketer Kamran Akmal heavily criticized the league over the poor-quality kits, while captain Marnus Labuschagne expressed his bewilderment at the unprecedented event.

title: Akshay Kumar reacts to Rajpal Yadav's debt case: 'I told him don't produce films'
content: Actor Rajpal Yadav, recently out on bail in a debt case, is set to star in 'Bhooth Bangla' with Akshay Kumar. Akshay Kumar recalled late actor Asrani's advice against producing films, a sentiment he shared with Rajpal.  Akshay praised Rajpal's acting talent and expressed hope for his recovery from the current situation.

title: DSSSB result 2026 out for ASO, combined posts at official site
content: The Delhi Subordinate Services Selection Board (DSSSB) has released Tier-I examination marks for Post Code 802/23 (3,050 vacancies) and Assistant Section Officer (ASO) Post Code 101/23 (13 vacancies). Candidates for 802/23 are shortlisted for a Skill Test, while ASO applicants will proceed to Tier-II. Marks are available on the DSSSB online portal.

title: PM Modi prays to Lord Ram, observes Surya Tilak ceremony at Ayodhya's Ram Mandir virtually
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi offered prayers and joined the Surya Tilak ceremony at Ayodhya's Ram Mandir virtually. He conveyed greetings for Ram Navami, wishing for renewed energy and enthusiasm across the nation. Devotees gathered at temples nationwide, with Ayodhya seeing large crowds. Security was enhanced to manage the pilgrims. Ram Navami celebrates the birth of Lord Rama.

title: India star’s brutal roast of Pakistan team: ‘Dete hi nahi importance unko’
content: India wicketkeeper-batter Jitesh Sharma downplayed the significance of facing Pakistan, stating that the team doesn't give them much importance and considers Australia and South Africa tougher opponents. He revealed that head coach Gautam Gambhir advises players to avoid playing with emotion against rivals, focusing on winning first.

title: 'They have the right': DK Shivakumar on Congress MLAs 'VIP' IPL ticket demand
content: Karnataka Deputy Chief Minister DK Shivakumar defended Congress legislators' demands for VIP IPL tickets, stating they are entitled to them as government members. He pledged to address the issue with authorities, while another MLA criticized the Karnataka State Cricket Association for allegedly not providing tickets and selling them at inflated prices.

title: 'Ukraine isn’t our war, yet …': Rubio calls on G7 to help with Hormuz reopening; slams Nato
content: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio criticized NATO allies for their perceived uneven engagement in global crises, highlighting US contributions to Ukraine while questioning European commitment to securing the Strait of Hormuz. Rubio emphasized that the strait's security is in Europe's interest, urging them to step up and address disruptions to global energy supplies.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi turns 15: Now officially eligible, is India senior next?
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, turning 15 today, is now eligible for senior international cricket after a sensational IPL debut. His record-breaking performances, including a 35-ball century and U19 World Cup heroics, have positioned him as a top prospect.  Selectors are watching closely as he could soon represent India's senior men's team.

title: The story of a poor woman who planted 384 banyan trees along a highway
content: Saalumarada Thimmakka, a humble labourer from Karnataka, transformed personal sorrow into a remarkable environmental legacy. She and her husband planted and nurtured 384 banyan trees along a highway, creating a vital green corridor.

title: Fact check: Shaquille O’Neal NSFW DM rumors with Sabrina Carpenter debunked
content: Shaquille O’Neal shut down viral claims that he sent inappropriate DMs to Sabrina Carpenter, calling the screenshots fake and mocking their tone on his podcast. The incident highlights how quickly misinformation spreads online. Away from the rumors, O’Neal has also reflected on his personal life, openly admitting mistakes in his past marriage and sharing lessons on honesty, responsibility, and growth.

title: Watch: Massive ruckus in J&K assembly as NC MLAs protest over killing of Iran's Ali Khamenei
content: National Conference MLAs protested the killing of former Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei and US-Israel military actions in Iran within the Jammu and Kashmir Assembly. The protest led to a scuffle with BJP MLAs, prompting an adjournment. Chief Minister Omar Abdullah condemned the conflict, stating regime change cannot be achieved through military bombardment.

title: Centre announces extra 20% LPG allocation to states amid global energy crisis
content: Amidst global energy supply concerns due to Middle East conflict, India has boosted commercial LPG allocation to 70% for industries like steel, auto, and textiles. This move aims to support labour-intensive sectors and those with specialized heating needs. The government also assured fuel security, refuting shortage claims and increasing refinery output.

title: 'Historic first': Nepal gets a rapper, Gen Z PM as Balendra Shah takes oath
content: Nepal has a new Prime Minister, Balendra Shah, the nation's youngest at 35.  A rapper-turned-politician and former Kathmandu mayor, Shah assumes office as the Rastriya Swatantra Party leader.  His rise signifies a shift, with his confrontational style against the federal government gaining traction.  This appointment follows the RSP's strong performance in recent elections.

title: Virat Kohli’s new lotus tattoo goes viral, artist reveals deeper meaning - watch
content: Virat Kohli has unveiled a striking new full-sleeve tattoo ahead of IPL 2026, featuring a lotus and peony. This evolving artwork, created by Aliens Tattoo India, symbolizes his personal transformation and journey, with the lotus representing purity and resilience. The design integrates and refines his existing tattoos into a cohesive narrative.

title: How every Sweet 16 game was won Thursday -- and each winner's keys to Elite Eight
content: Arizona, Illinois, Iowa and Purdue are moving on. Here's how they advanced -- and how they can do it again.

title: Arizona rolls, hands Calipari worst tourney loss
content: Arizona finally got over the Sweet 16 hurdle under coach Tommy Lloyd, getting 23 points from Brayden Burries and a dominant offensive effort in a 109-88 win over Arkansas on Thursday night in the NCAA tournament.

title: Tucker getting into groove as Dodgers win opener
content: Kyle Tucker padded the Dodgers' lead as Los Angeles drubbed the Diamondbacks to begin their three-peat quest.

title: Phils' Bohm accuses parents of siphoning money
content: Phillies third baseman Alec Bohm has sued his parents for millions of dollars, alleging they moved large amounts of his money into financial accounts they managed for him and then used some of the cash to pay their own expenses.

title: Gervin irked QB Williams filed 'Iceman' trademark
content: Former NBA star George Gervin said he was "caught off guard" when he learned Bears quarterback Caleb Williams had attempted to trademark "Iceman," a nickname Gervin has used since his playing days.

title: Illini defense gets tough to oust No. 2 Houston
content: Illinois held Houston to just 34% shooting in its lowest-scoring game of the season, as the Fighting Illini won 65-55 to advance to the Elite Eight.

title: Huskers' Hoiberg shoulders personnel blunder
content: Coach Fred Hoiberg said a late-game blunder that left his team with only four players on the court before a critical three-point play in the final minute of Thursday night's loss to Iowa in the Sweet 16 was his fault.

title: Kaufman-Renn's tip-in sends Purdue into Elite 8
content: Trey Kaufman-Renn tipped in a bucket with 0.7 seconds left, giving Purdue a 79-77 win over Texas in the Sweet 16 of the NCAA tournament.

title: 🏈 NFL draft: Biggest needs for all 32 teams
content: Our NFL reporters listed the top three positional needs for all 32 teams ahead of April's draft, and our draft experts found non-Round 1 fits to fill them.

title: Men's March Madness: Predictions, previews for every Sweet 16 game Friday
content: ESPN's college basketball crew is aligned on which teams will advance, and break down the keys for every team.

title: 'Nobody has seen the best in Vladdy yet': How a dominant October took Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to a new level
content: Toronto's slugger proved he was a superstar in the playoffs, but it was in his leadership that he really stepped up. Now, the hope is that carries over to 2026 -- and beyond.

title: World Series contender tiers: How far away from winning it all is your favorite MLB team?
content: Only one team will win a ring this year. Can anybody stop L.A.? And who will emerge in 2027, 2028, 2029 ...?

title: Why NBA insiders are all-in on the Spurs: 'Victor breaks all the rules'
content: San Antonio's title buzz is growing around the league. Plus, new intel on expansion and an East playoff race full of injury questions.

title: Updated NBA rookie rankings: Why the ROY race is all but over
content: Where do the NBA's top rookies stack up with a few weeks left in the regular season? We stacked the top 10.

title: A former NFL GM's must-draft board for 2026: Tannenbaum pounds the table for 14 prospects
content: From Dillon Thieneman on Day 1 to Jaffer Murphy late on Day 3, Mike Tannenbaum picks the draft prospects he'd want to target across all seven rounds.

title: Latest NFL draft buzz: Ty Simpson's pro day and more
content: How high could QB Ty Simpson get picked? Is Jeremiyah Love really a possibility for the Titans at No. 4?

title: Lunardi: Want Cinderella back? Set an NCAA tournament eligibility floor
content: The blame for Cinderella's demise is misplaced. Here's why we haven't seen her -- and how we can get her back.

title: The USMNT's weakness at World Cups has been a lack of depth. Has that finally changed?
content: World Cup-winning teams need more than their starting 11, but the U.S. men's national team never had enough good bench options. Maybe that has finally changed?

title: Spiky and unforgettable, Wales went 'full gas' but paid the price
content: Wales scrapped for every inch of the pitch against Bosnia and Herzegovina, but in the end, it wasn't enough to save their World Cup dream.

title: World Cup playoff preview, predictions: Who will book the final six spots?
content: The final six spots -- four from Europe and two from the intercontinental playoff -- will be clinched this week.

title: Arbeloa has won over Real Madrid doubters. Can he lead them to a trophy?
content: Whether it's the coach, the players, or both, Real Madrid have improved since Álvaro Arbeloa took over in January, and he could yet save their season.

title: Ranking coaches and teams that are likely to improve in 2026
content: Curt Cignetti reset how we view coaching turnarounds while Oklahoma State, with a new coach, has nowhere to go but up.

title: An early look at 2027 NFL free agency: Which playmakers could be available next March?
content: Which top players might be available in next year's NFL free agency? We picked out 49 stars to keep an eye on.

title: Ranking all 32 free agency classes: Which teams most improved their rosters?
content: How did every team fare in March, taking into account free agent signings, trades, extensions and departures?

title: The unexpected path that led Morgan and Frankie Price to Arkansas
content: The Price sisters have led the Arkansas gymnastics team in their final season of the sport -- and they hope it ends with an NCAA championship berth.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: 'The KING ... Shot by ME': Caitlin Clark photographs LeBron James at Lakers-Pacers
content: The Fever star was behind the lens as a credentialed photographer at Wednesday's Lakers-Pacers matchup.

title: Each MLB team's most interesting giveaway this season
content: Not all ballpark giveaways are created equal. Here's each team's most creative offering for the upcoming campaign.

title: Women's tournament: UConn still title favorite as Virginia upset shakes up the odds
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: 'What I'm thinking is arena football but outdoors': How Mike Repole is remaking the UFL
content: Repole is the man behind many of the UFL's changes, including smaller venues and the four-point field goal.

title: 25 trends to know before draft season begins
content: Mike Clay shares his favorite notes from the research that informed his fantasy projections for 2026.

title: 'Definitely not my final chapter': A refreshed Israel Adesanya isn't done yet
content: He may have traded right hooks and calf kicks for DJ decks last year, but Israel Adesanya insists he is motivated to continue his UFC career -- starting this weekend against Joe Pyfer.

title: Max Verstappen vs. F1's new rules: Every complaint this season -- and our verdict
content: Amid a wave of complaints from F1's four-time world champion Max Verstappen, ESPN's Nate Saunders examines every one and gives his verdict on if they are warranted.

title: From IndyCar royalty to NASCAR dynasty: How Penske conquered American racing
content: Roger Penske's racing enterprises have long been synonymous with IndyCar, but now they've built the most decorated team in recent NASCAR history, too.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Could Foden leave Man City this summer?
content: Phil Foden could reportedly leave Manchester City in the hunt for more first-team football. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Manhunt on for man accused of attempt to defame and extort Indian Union Muslim League Kerala president Thangal
content: Fake social media post circulated about a week ago to defame Syed Sadikali Shihab Thangal was part of a larger plan, say police

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Rajya Sabha discusses Finance Bill, 2026
content: P.K. Mody, Secretary-General, says the Lok Sabha adopted the motion that the Rajya Sabha do extend time for presentation of the report of the joint committee on the Constitution 130th Amendment Bill, 2025, the Jammu and Kashmir reorganisation Bill, 2025, the Government of Union Territories Amendment Bill, 2025; Lok Sabha takes up Matters of public importance

title: Marumagal Vaaku: an allegorical Tamil short story on the emotional coercion of voters
content: Unlike high-pitched electioneering the State is known for, the TVK’s campaign seems in part to be unfolding quietly within households. What unfolds is reminiscent of the short story Marumagal Vaaku (Dauther-in-law’s Vote) by the late Tamil writer Krishnan Nambi

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: Kerala CM slams Congress for 'baseless claims' of CPI(M) collusion with RSS; AIADMK releases second list of candidates
content: West Bengal BJP's Dilip Ghosh criticises CM Mamata over Basanti Bazar clashes, alleges people broke into BJP party office, got into fights during a rally

title: 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly election will be a close battle, says P. Chidambaram
content: Congress leader P. Chidambaram says 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly election will not be one sided like 2024 Lok Sabha polls; rules out inevitability of coalition government

title: ED arrests Al Falah group chairman in second PMLA case
content: A probe found that “forged” documents were prepared and used for fraudulent acquisition of land, and Mr. Siddiqui, director and majority shareholder of Tarbia Education Foundation, connived with some individuals and orchestrated the fabrication

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Touted as cement hub, but for Ariyalur constituency voters the future appears grey
content: Residents, who blame successive governments for failing to invest adequately and prioritise the district, feel that the constituency would have changed to a great extent if it had high-profile leaders

title: Allocation for commercial LPG increased to 70% of pre-conflict levels
content: It was reported earlier that the Union Steel Ministry had sought the Petroleum Ministry’s intervention to ensure that plants do not run out of LPG.

title: Freezing of KSOU’s bank accounts: V-C to consult Karnataka Governor over next course of action
content: The Congress government in Karnataka was against KSOU ‘hosting’ a three-day conference on Hindutva ideologue Deendayal Upadhyaya

title: Farooq Abdullah calls for end to West Asia conflict to ensure global peace
content: Farooq Abdullah said stopping the war was a question for "the big powers" and the people can only pray that God somehow gets rid of the conflict

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: AIADMK releases manifesto; assures free refrigerators to women ration card-holders
content: The distribution of free refrigerators to women beneficiaries of the PDS, the revision of electricity tariff on common facilities in multi-storey apartments, and the increase in horizontal reservation for government school students in admission to the medical courses from 7.5% to 10.5% are among the highlights of the manifesto

title: Maximum temperatures cross 40°C in Telangana, yellow alert till March 31
content: Hyderabad may receive light to moderate rain or thundershowers towards evening or night over the next 48 hours

title: SIT flooded with over 50 phone calls on Nashik 'godman' held for rape; complaints being verified
content: A senior official said that since the launch of the two dedicated mobile numbers, the probe team received an average of 15 to 20 phone calls daily

title: Kerala Assembly polls: CPI(M) accuses Congress of aiding BJP’s past wins in Thrissur, Nemom
content: Responding to allegations of CPI(M)-BJP deal raised by UDF, Govindan says the Left party has consistently opposed RSS and BJP, while the Congress had held discussions Sangh Parivar leaders

title: Emergency landing of drone creates panic in tribal hamlet at G. Madugula in ASR district
content: The drone operated by Redwing was being tested as part of an initiative to deliver medicines to remote Agency areas. It had taken off from Paderu and was en route to G. Madugula when it reportedly went out of control mid-flight, says sources

title: TVK’s entry won’t cause any split in minority votes: IUML leader Kader Mohideen
content: K.M. Kader Mohideen, 86, the national president of the Indian Union Muslim League (IUML), a long-standing ally of the DMK, speaks to The Hindu on the performance of the DMK government, the expansion of the Secular Progressive Alliance, the fledgling TVK led by actor Vijay, and more. Excerpts:

title: Bengaluru Central City Corporation presents maiden budget with outlay of ₹3,426.60 crore
content: A major highlight is the push to strengthen public healthcare, including the introduction of a Bike Ambulance – First Responder Unit scheme to provide immediate, free life-saving care during the critical ‘golden hour’

title: Poll official objects to government advertisement during training in Bengal’s Nadia; alleges assault
content: A government advertisement featuring CM Mamata Banerjee was displayed on a projector before the session began, prompting objections from some polling officials who said the Model Code of Conduct was in force

title: Lockdown in India rumours ‘completely false’, say Union Ministers
content: Union Ministers Hardeep Singh Puri and Nirmala Sitharaman dismissed the claims and stated that there is “no proposal under consideration”

title: New butterfly species recorded in Arunachal named after Zubeen Garg
content: The researchers have suggested Basar Duke as the common name of Euthalia zubeengargi found in the Basar region of Leparada district

title: Parliamentary Committee examining Bills to remove PM and CMs get more time to submit report
content: The committee, chaired by BJP leader Aparajita Sarangi, is examining three bills -- The Constitution (One Hundred and Thirtieth Amendment) Bill, 2025; The Jammu and Kashmir Reorganisation (Amendment) Bill, 2025; and The Government of Union Territories (Amendment) Bill, 2025.

title: Assam candidate has 37 bank accounts, 32 vehicles
content: Sewli Mohilary, the wife of Bodoland Territorial Council chief, is far behind AIUDF chief, Mohammed Badruddin Ajmal, who declared assets worth ₹222.34 crore

title: Robots, drones and sprayers available for farmers ready to switch to modern technology
content: Mechanisation, natural farming to help overcome farmer distress, says ICAR award winning progressive farmer

title: Omar Abdullah condemns Iran war, killing of Khamenei in J&K Assembly
content: J&K Chief Minister Omar Abdullah urges Prime Minister Narendra Modi to help end Iran war as legislators protest in Assembly

title: Ramesh Chennithala alleges scam in software contract for primary agriculture credit societies in Kerala
content: Congress leader says original decision to award the contract to Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) for ₹206 crore was cancelled and a fresh tender was invited under mysterious circumstances

title: Order CBI probe against Murasoli Trust, litigant urges Madras High Court
content: The trust claims it to be a politically motivated litigation and accuses the litigant of not having disclosed that he is a district secretary of the BJP

title: Watch: Kasaragod decides three-way battle: Kerala Elections 2026
content: Kasaragod, Kerala’s northern gateway and “Saptha Bhasha Sangamam Bhoomi,” heads into the April 9 assembly election with a tight three-cornered contest. The Indian Union Muslim League-led UDF faces a strong challenge from the Bharatiya Janata Party, while the Communist Party of India (Marxist)-backed independent adds a third angle. UDF’s Kallatra Mahin Haji banks on legacy, BJP’s Ashwini M.L. pushes development, and LDF-supported Shanavas Padhoor targets grassroots voters. Key issues include healthcare gaps, dependence on Mangaluru, Endosulfan concerns, and linguistic rights.

title: Nagaland Assembly refers FNTA Bill back to govt
content: Parliamentary Affairs Minister KG Kenye told the House that a letter from the Eastern Nagaland Legislators Union (ENLU) highlighted certain provisions missing in the Bill when compared to the Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) signed on February 5, in New Delhi, between the Centre, the State government and the Eastern Nagaland Peoples' Organisation (ENPO)

title: What we know so far about the Supreme Court’s ruling on reservation for converted Dalits
content: The Supreme Court ruled that a person professing any religion other than Hinduism, Buddhism, or Sikhism cannot be recognised as a member of a Scheduled Caste

title: Accused shot at and injured during scene reconstruction of kidnap of 5-year-old in Anantapur
content: The accused reportedly turned aggressive and assaulted police personnel with a broken beer bottle, prompting police to fire in the air and then shoot him in the knee

title: Fuel excise cuts pre-election salve, says Congress, flags steady price rise despite fall in crude
content: Pawan Khera pointed out that these companies have been absorbing losses since the outbreak of the conflict in West Asia; "The government has now merely agreed to share a small part of that burden but reducing the 'special additional' levy - that too almost a month later," the Congress leader said.

title: The surging cost of health care in Kerala
content: The interest shown by global private equity firms in Kerala’s private health sector has given rise to apprehensions that medical treatment may become a costly affair. A.S. Jayanth finds out A look at the possible fallout of the massive foreign investment in hospitals in the State

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: Salem North constituency residents demand shifting of two TASMAC outlets
content: At the Kannankurichi town panchayat, most of the lands have been developed into housing plots in the last 15 years and people are willing to buy lands in this panchayat as it is situated near the foothills of Yercaud.

title: Bengaluru East City Corporation presents maiden budget with outlay of ₹3,889.98 crore
content: The budget largely focuses on public work aimed at improving last-mile connectivity and ensuring smoother traffic flow through the development of arterial and sub-arterial roads

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Coonoor constituency needs a sustainable development model
content: For years, residents have demanded that a sewage treatment plant be set up to treat the town’s waste water, which flows downstream and joins the Bhavani River

title: Capitals' Ovechkin notches 34th career hat trick
content: Alex Ovechkin tallies a hat trick as the Capitals beat the Mammoth (1:01) SALT LAKE CITY --  Alex Ovechkin  had his 34th career hat trick,  Ivan Miroshnichenko  scored twice, and the  Washington Capitals  beat the  Utah Mammoth   7-4  on Thursday night to snap a two-game losing streak. Ovechkin scored his first goal at the 5:01 mark of the second period, when he tipped in a puck in traffic, cutting Utah's lead to 3-2. He tied the score at 3-3 with 8:32 left in the second, chipping the puck under the crossbar. Ovechkin completed the hat trick with an empty-netter with 5.2 seconds left. The 40-year-old passed Brett Hull for fourth-most hat tricks in NHL history. Ovechkin has scored hat tricks against 21 different franchises, passing Hull for the most in NHL history, according to ESPN Research. Anthony Beauvillier  and  Rasmus Sandin  also scored for the Capitals, while  Logan Thompson  made 35 stops for Washington. The Associated Press contributed to this report.
